rationale.R1.5: Proposes a clear structural reorganization with rationale, moving contribution to top or shortening related work.
rationale.RX.1: Identifies key uncertainties and suggests mitigations, showing good uncertainty handling.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No major regressions; some minor oversight in citation checks but no harm introduced.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but lacks annotation for all changes.
